seoTitle: Bondi Forest vs Bonnells Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bondi Forest and Bonnells Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bondi Forest vs Bonnells Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bondi Forest and Bonnells Bay.
heading: Bondi Forest vs Bonnells Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bondi Forest, New South Wales and Bonnells Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bondi Forest has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Bonnells Bay (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bondi Forest or Bonnells Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bondi Forest has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Bonnells Bay scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bondi Forest scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Bonnells Bay scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bondi Forest or Bonnells Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bondi Forest has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
